00038 
00039 package java.io;
00040 
00051 public abstract class OutputStream
00052 {
00057     public OutputStream()
00058     {
00059     }
00060 
00072     public abstract void write(int b) throws IOException;
00073 
00084     public void write(byte[] b) throws IOException, NullPointerException
00085     {
00086         write (b, 0, b.length);
00087     }
00088 
00104     public void write(byte[] b, int off, int len)
00105         throws IOException, NullPointerException, IndexOutOfBoundsException
00106     {
00107         if (off < 0 || len < 0 || off + len > b.length)
00108             throw new ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException ();
00109 
00110         for (int i = 0; i < len; ++i)
00111              write (b[off + i]);
00112     }
00113 
00125     public void flush() throws IOException
00126     {
00127     }
00128 
00138     public void close() throws IOException
00139     {
00140     }
00141 }
